message:
Merge PR #1996: feat(query): add has_metadata_key to bd query DSL

Adds has_metadata_key=<keyname> filter to bd query, enabling queries like 'bd list -q has_metadata_key=team'.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/1996
Author: turian (Joseph Turian)

files.patch:
@@ -332,9 +332,10 @@ var KnownFields = map[string]bool{
 	"template":  true,
 
 	// Other
-	"spec":     true,
-	"spec_id":  true, // alias
-	"parent":   true,
-	"mol_type": true,
-	"notes":    true,
+	"spec":             true,
+	"spec_id":          true, // alias
+	"parent":           true,
+	"mol_type":         true,
+	"notes":            true,
+	"has_metadata_key": true, // GH#1406
 }
